message:
style: rustfmt formatting and minor cleanups

certificate.rs: Reformat assert! macro chains to standard multi-line
  style with closing paren on its own line (4 instances)

gf256.rs: Rename local variables d_words/s_words → dst_parts/xor_parts
  in xor_chunk_32_in_place for clarity (pure rename, no logic change)

mysql.rs: Replace buf.clear() with buf.buf.clear() in 4 test
  assertions to use the inner buffer directly (avoids ambiguity with
  any future clear() method changes)

fabric.rs: Simplify EventRecorder construction using field shorthand
  (events: events.clone() → events, since the clone is no longer needed
  after the Arc is moved)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
